diff.title: Schema Diff
diff.description: Builds a migration that changes the database above to match the one you pick below. It opens as a script in a new query tab to review and run — nothing changes automatically.
diff.error.unsupported: Schema Diff doesn't support the '{0}' engine yet (reads via information_schema; Postgres, MySQL and SQL Server only).
diff.error.noTarget: Pick a connection and database to compare against.
diff.result.identical: No differences — this schema already matches {0}.
diff.script.header: -- These statements run against {0}; they add/adjust what it's missing or differs on versus {1}.
diff.result.opened: Opened the migration in a query tab on {0} — review it there and run when ready.
